code: import React from'react';import{useApp}from'../context/AppContext';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const pageTitles={dashboard:{title:'Dashboard',sub:'Your financial overview'},transactions:{title:'Transactions',sub:'All your activity'},insights:{title:'Insights',sub:'Patterns & observations'}};export default function Topbar(_ref){let{onMenuClick}=_ref;const{darkMode,setDarkMode,role,setRole,activeTab}=useApp();const page=pageTitles[activeTab]||{title:'Dashboard',sub:''};const toggleTheme=()=>{setDarkMode(prev=>!prev);};const handleRoleChange=e=>{setRole(e.target.value);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("header",{className:"topbar",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{display:'flex',alignItems:'center',gap:14},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"hamburger",onClick:onMenuClick,style:{display:'flex'},children:"\u2630"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"topbar-left",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{style:{marginBottom:2},children:page.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:page.sub})]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"topbar-right",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("select",{className:"role-select",value:role,onChange:handleRoleChange,title:"Switch role",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:"viewer",children:"\uD83D\uDC41 Viewer"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:"admin",children:"\u26A1 Admin"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"theme-toggle",onClick:toggleTheme,title:"Toggle theme",children:darkMode?'☀':'☾'})]})]});}
